#  Sensing 
##  vector magnetometers powered by diamond 
**Our quantum magnetometer is designed for real-world use, with reliable operation across a wide range of environments, including industrial, mobile, and field deployments.**
The system delivers high-performance magnetic sensing and is easy to integrate into existing platforms and control electronics.
**Trusted. Precise. Mission ready.**
![](https://b4423276.smushcdn.com/4423276/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Website-Applications-Images-1200-x-900-mm-2-3.png?lossy=1&strip=1&webp=1)
##  quantum magnetic navigation 
###  knowing where you are, without constraints 
**Our versatile technology brings magnetic navigation to mobile, drone, and other autonomous systems, enabling reliable operation in complex, constrained, and GPS-denied environments**.
Positioning, Navigation & Timing (PNT) is the invisible backbone of modern infrastructure, powering aviation, shipping, autonomous systems, and global communications. However, GPS can be jammed, spoofed, or denied, creating critical vulnerabilities. This has driven growing demand for PNT technologies that operate independently of satellites.
We deliver navigation-grade quantum magnetometers based on NV-diamond technology that determine position by reading minute variations in the Earth’s magnetic field, providing a vital component for resilient navigation. Our technology is designed for integration across:
  * unmanned aerial systems (UAS/drones)
  * autonomous ground vehicles
  * submarines and maritime platforms
  * defence and space systems


![](https://b4423276.smushcdn.com/4423276/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Situational-Awareness-1-scaled.png?lossy=1&strip=1&webp=1)
##  situational awareness 
###  powerful detection in a small package 
**Our compact diamond quantum magnetometers provide high-sensitivity, vector magnetic sensing to detect subtle magnetic changes with low noise and minimal drift, while operating passively in ambient conditions.**
Situational awareness does not always come from cameras, radars, LiDARs, and other surface-level sensing technologies. Detecting magnetic field disturbances can reveal context that other methods miss, supporting applications such as autonomous infrastructure monitoring, operation in complex urban and indoor environments, and subsurface or underwater scenarios where conventional sensors struggle.
![](https://b4423276.smushcdn.com/4423276/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/Sensing-other.png?lossy=1&strip=1&webp=1)
##  other applications 
###  do more with diamond 
**We work with partners to unlock the use of diamond materials in life-science contexts, providing advanced diamond materials that can be applied beyond computing and sensing to enable next-generation biological efficacy testing.**
Diamond is a versatile sensing platform, extending into other applications such as biomedical imaging and radio-frequency (RF) sensing.
In biomedical applications, diamond can unlock capabilities such as micro-imaging, MRI, medical testing, and prosthetics.
Diamond-based RF receivers offer ultra-wideband detection from DC to GHz frequencies which, when combined with vector sensing, offer a unique capability in radio direction finding and EM communications awareness.
